hvac-survey.static_subject: Quick question about your business calls
hvac-survey.static_body:
Hi {first_name},

My name is Nathan from GMIC.ai. We're conducting a brief research study to better understand how HVAC companies handle customer calls.

If you have a minute, we'd love your input on a couple of questions:

About how many calls does your business receive in a typical week?
Do you ever miss calls or receive calls after hours?
What system or CRM do you use to manage customers?

Thank you for your time and for the work you do in the community!
